message:
test(core): property-based tests for secrets module

35 property tests covering:
- SecretScanOptions: serde roundtrip, default values, field preservation
- SecretScanScope: serde roundtrip, default, from_options, field isolation
- scope_hash: determinism, 64-char hex format, collision resistance,
  scope-only sensitivity (ignores batch_size/sample_limit)
- SecretScanSample: serde roundtrip, field presence, hash format
- SecretScanReport: serde roundtrip, field integrity, BTreeMap ordering,
  scope preservation, samples preservation, JSON structure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
